summary: Frontend testing completed for K&N logo integration and inventory image upload features. Most UI components working correctly but backend API integration has proxy/routing issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Frontend proxy returns HTML instead of JSON - causing 'Unexpected token < doctype' error
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all API interactions from frontend including login, inventory operations

integration_issues.issue: Vite proxy configuration may not be routing /api calls correctly to backend port 8001
integration_issues.symptoms: Login form shows JSON parse error, inventory operations fail
integration_issues.workaround: Direct backend API calls work (tested via curl)

ui_bugs.issue: Camera icon not rendering in image upload area

integration_issues.issue: API proxy configuration preventing normal operation

passed_tests: Admin login page shows K&N logo image (verified Cloudinary URL)
Favicon correctly set to K&N logo image
Admin sidebar displays K&N logo image (not text)
Inventory form has Product Image upload area with proper styling
Inventory table has Image column header
Image upload area has correct dashed border styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend API proxy configuration - requests to /api/* are returning HTML instead of JSON. Check Vite proxy settings in client/vite.config.js or consider updating API routing. Also investigate missing camera icon in inventory upload form.
